message:
refactor: Use zig-out/cache/ and zig-out/bin/ for build outputs

Restructure build outputs to follow Zig's standard directory layout
with source paths mirrored inside each folder:

- zig-out/cache/<source>/ - intermediate files (bundle.js, bundle_compiled.c)
- zig-out/bin/<source>/   - final outputs (hello.wasm, hello.aot)

This avoids conflicts if source folder is named "bin" and keeps
all outputs organized within Zig's standard structure.

Example: bench/hello.js →
  cache: zig-out/cache/bench/bundle_compiled.c
  output: zig-out/bin/bench/hello.aot

files.patch:
@@ -54,8 +54,8 @@ if [ ! -x "$EDGEBOX" ]; then
 fi
 
 # Build benchmark artifacts
-# Outputs go to zig-out/bench/ (mirrors source folder structure)
-BENCH_OUT="$ROOT_DIR/zig-out/bench"
+# Outputs go to zig-out/bin/bench/ (final outputs mirror source structure within bin/)
+BENCH_OUT="$ROOT_DIR/zig-out/bin/bench"
 mkdir -p "$BENCH_OUT"
 
 build_bench() {
